creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Commit of this patch requires almost every Haskell ports to be changed. 
They include a HSCOLOUR_VERSION variable that should have the same value 
as the actual version of HsColour (i.e. HSCOLOUR_VERSION= 1.15) to find 
the corresponding files. 

The required changes can be covered only by a sweeping commit, so they 
are deferred until the ports freeze is over.
